comment: Reference adapter manifest produced by onboarding nervepack to Claude Code. Copy to ~/.config/nervepack/adapter.json (per-machine; not committed). Each 'verify' is a deterministic shell command the doctor runs (exit 0 = the capability is genuinely wired). The wiring it verifies is what setup/30-link-skills.sh and setup/5x-install-*.sh produce — read those as the worked example.
